package rulecoverage

func NegativeServiceMethodHandlesRequestBindingOrHeaderExtraction() string {
    ruleID := "service_method_handles_request_binding_or_header_extraction"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Services that extract headers, cookies, forms, or route params directly."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
